commits.message: fix: resolve type errors for CI pass
fix: broadcast-critical chart display and performance issues
fix: Handle LLM param variations and make participants optional
fix(critical): Fix two breaking bugs discovered through skeptical testing
fix: Align meeting scheduler with official database schema
feat: Add meeting scheduler capability with Discord and email participant support
